notes: Browser-sniff with Claude-in-Chrome confirmed greatclips.com uses HttpOnly session cookies (Auth0 tenant cid.greatclips.com). All 5 captured webservices/stylewaretouch calls had credentials:include and zero Authorization headers.

v0.1 ships every endpoint shape with correct host routing, dry-run, and JSON output, but does not yet attach the Chrome cookies on the wire. Live network tests require manual cookie capture from a logged-in Chrome session (documented gap in README/SKILL/research.json).

Killer flow request shapes verified via dry-run: `checkin --salon-number 8991 --guests 4` produces POST stylewaretouch.net/api/customer/checkIn with the right body; `wait --store-number 8991` produces POST stylewaretouch.net/api/store/waitTime.
